ABOUT.DESCRIPTION: I'm a programmer focused on web development and applications.
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION2: Game development is a hobby for me.

CONTACT_MODAL.TITLE: Contact me

ABOUTME.NAME: Pablo González
ABOUTME.DESCRIPTION1: I'm a web developer with a special interest in frontend, although I can also work as fullstack or backend if the project requires it.
ABOUTME.DESCRIPTION2: I started my journey in development with a higher degree in Multiplatform Applications, which gave me a solid foundation in programming. Later I studied a higher degree in 3D Animation and a Master's in Video Game Development, although my main focus is currently web and application development.
ABOUTME.DESCRIPTION3: I am proactive, committed and team-oriented. I always seek to learn and grow professionally, and I am excited about the idea of contributing to innovative projects.
ABOUTME.DESCRIPTION4: Don't hesitate to contact me if you have any questions!

PROJECT_DESCRIPTIONS.CHRONO_SPACE: Role as development and programming lead. Developed by 8 students in 3 months
PROJECT_DESCRIPTIONS.MENCIA: Role as programming leader. Developed by 30 students in 3 months
PROJECT_DESCRIPTIONS.POKEMON_CARD: A Dockerized TCG management engine that automates catalog updates through external API integration. It synchronizes remote data into a local database for persistent collection tracking and features dynamic set customization, allowing the creation of hybrid expansions. Built with a focus on scalable architecture and real-time synchronization with the latest market releases.
PROJECT_DESCRIPTIONS.PORTFOLIO: My presentation website made with Angular 20
PROJECT_DESCRIPTIONS.FLUTTER_GEN: Basic Flutter project generator. Generates a .bat file. Run in the desired folder
PROJECT_DESCRIPTIONS.BIDEX: Competitive strategy tool with native Pokémon Showdown support, fully integrated with the Pokémon Champions meta. Built with an optimized local database architecture, it features advanced team management and data customization through CSV file processing.
PROJECT_DESCRIPTIONS.BIDEX_WEB: Tool for competitive play support, featuring native integration with Pokémon Showdown and the Pokémon Champions metagame. Built on a microservices architecture using Supabase, with a clear separation between user management and Pokémon data to enhance scalability.
PROJECT_DESCRIPTIONS.KEEPIT: App to know where I stored objects. Developed with local storage.
